title: Add config validator module in src/utils/configValidator.ts with tests
description: Create a config validation utility module at src/utils/configValidator.ts with co-located test file src/utils/configValidator.test.ts. The module should validate Kody task configuration: required fields (e.g., task description), type constraints, and mutual exclusivity of the --no-compose flag with compose-related options (--compose, --compose-all). Follow the existing utility module pattern (single-responsibility file, named exports, JSDoc comments) and use the Result<T, E> type from src/utils/result.ts for explicit error handling.
existing_patterns: src/utils/result.ts — Result<T, E> discriminated union for explicit error handling that the validator should reuse for its return type
src/utils/*.ts — Single-responsibility utility modules (debounce.ts, retry.ts, flatten.ts) with co-located .test.ts files, named exports, JSDoc comments, and @example sections
vitest.config.mts — Test configuration; new test file must match include pattern src/**/*.test.ts
